scripts.auth: sh -c 'test -n "${GRAPH_DEPLOY_KEY:-}" || { echo "GRAPH_DEPLOY_KEY is required"; exit 1; }; graph auth "$GRAPH_DEPLOY_KEY"' --
scripts.deploy: sh -c 'ts-node-esm scripts/render_manifest.ts "$@" && test -n "${GRAPH_DEPLOY_KEY:-}" || { echo "GRAPH_DEPLOY_KEY is required"; exit 1; } && test -n "${GRAPH_SUBGRAPH_SLUG:-}" || { echo "GRAPH_SUBGRAPH_SLUG is required"; exit 1; } && graph deploy --node https://api.studio.thegraph.com/deploy/ --deploy-key "$GRAPH_DEPLOY_KEY" "$GRAPH_SUBGRAPH_SLUG" subgraph.rendered.yaml "$@"' --
scripts.deploy-local: sh -c 'ts-node-esm scripts/render_manifest.ts "$@" && graph deploy --node "${GRAPH_NODE_URL:-http://localhost:8020/}" --ipfs "${IPFS_URL:-http://localhost:5001}" roboshare/protocol subgraph.rendered.yaml "$@"' --
scripts.deploy-local-auto: sh -c 'ts-node-esm scripts/render_manifest.ts "$@" && graph deploy --node "${GRAPH_NODE_URL:-http://localhost:8020/}" --ipfs "${IPFS_URL:-http://localhost:5001}" --version-label v0.0.1 roboshare/protocol subgraph.rendered.yaml "$@"' --
scripts.local-ship: yarn abi-copy && yarn codegen && yarn build --network localhost && yarn deploy-local
scripts.local-ship-auto: yarn abi-copy && yarn codegen && yarn build --network localhost && yarn deploy-local-auto
